text.tspan: COVID-19: Share of people fully vaccinated vs. share that have received at
Share of the total population that have received all doses prescribed by the initial vaccination protocol vs. the share that has
Share of people that have received at least one dose
Source: Official data collated by Our World in Data – Last updated 21 January 2022, 11:00 (London time)
Note: Alternative definitions of a full vaccination, e.g. having been infected with SARS-CoV-2 and having 1 dose of a 2-dose protocol, are
ignored to maximize comparability between countries.
